content.problemStatement:
An input string SSS of length NNN is transferred through the network using a special protocol. The protocol can send the string through a series of operations. In one operation, we can choose a lowercase english alphabet CCC and do **one** of the following:


Transfer 111 copy of CCC through the network.
Transfer 222 copies of CCC through the network.
Each of the above transfers take 111 unit of time.

Find the **minimum** time in which we can transfer the entire string SSS through the network.


Input Format

The first line will contain TTT - the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
First line of each test case contains NNN - the length of the string SSS.
Second line of each test case contains the string SSS.


Output Format
For each test case, output in a single line, the minimum time required to transfer the string.
constraints: Sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10510^5105.
String SSS contains lowercase english alphabets only.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 111: String can be transferred through following operations: send 111 copy of character c\texttt{c}c, send 111 copy of character b\texttt{b}b, send 111 copy of character c\texttt{c}c, send 111 copy of character d\texttt{d}d, and send 111 copy of character c\texttt{c}c. Thus, total 555 operations are required.
Test Case 222: String can be transferred through following operations: send 222 copies of character a\texttt{a}a, send 111 copy of character b\texttt{b}b, send 111 copy of character e\texttt{e}e, and send 222 copies of character e\texttt{e}e. Thus, total 444 operations are required.
